text:
(include where a care order or placement order has been made)

Transcript

The local authority shall by 4.00pm on [date] apply for a transcript of the judgment given today. The cost of the transcript must be paid by the local authority.

Costs

No order for costs save public funding assessment of the costs of the legally aided parties.

SCHEDULE

The court records the following information for the purposes of the Family Advocacy Scheme (FAS):

the advocates met for pre-hearing discussions between [time] and [time];

the hearing started at [time] and ended at [time];

the court allowed 1 hour thereafter for preparation and agreement of the order between [time] and [time];

[name of advocate] is entitled to a bolt on because they are representing a client who is facing allegations that they have caused significant harm to a child which have been made or adopted by the local authority and are a live issue in proceedings;

[name of advocate] is entitled to a bolt on because they are representing a person who has difficulty in giving instructions or understanding advice;

all advocates are entitled to a bolt on because an independent expert witness was cross-examined and substantially challenged by a party at the hearing; and

the advocates’ bundle page count is [number].

Dated [date]

Case No: [insert]

SCHEDULE OF FINDINGS MADE ON [DATE] BY [JUDGE]

(adapt this example schedule as appropriate to the case)

On [date] [name of judge] [handed down judgment] / [gave an oral judgment] / [accepted the proposed agreed threshold document] and made the following findings:

Threshold findings:

(insert threshold findings into this table, or if the court found threshold proved in accordance with the la schedule of allegation / threshold document and it is easier to do so, replace the table by copy and pasting as findings from that document into this schedule)

Other findings:

Order
Children Act 1989
The Adoption and Children Act 2002 | Order
Children Act 1989
The Adoption and Children Act 2002 | Order
Children Act 1989
The Adoption and Children Act 2002

The full name(s) of the children | Boy or Girl | Date(s) of Birth
